name: Summer Squash Medley
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Wash and slice the squash; sauté until tender.
3. Cut bell peppers into chunks and add to the skillet; cook with the squash.
4. Wash and slice green onions, then add them to the skillet.
5. Add sliced tomatoes cut into wedges.
6. When all vegetables are tender, stir in sugar, salt, and black pepper.
7. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
8. Serve immediately.
